assertionResults.title: SampleApp contract matches real claimed diagnostics
assertionResults.reason: The real SampleApp Release rebuild emitted SampleApp.sarif, and the focused SampleApp_ClaimedDiagnosticsMatchContract verifier passed. The current SARIF summary shows 77 total results with the expected claimed DI rules still present, including DI012, DI012b, and two DI015 warnings.

assertionResults.title: DI015InAction keeps its broken-vs-fixed unresolved-dependency contrast
assertionResults.reason: The direct DI015InAction Release rebuild produced only the two documented broken-case DI015 warnings for BrokenInvoiceScheduler and BrokenKeyedNotificationRunner, and the focused DI015InAction_BrokenCasesReportWhileFixedStaysClean verifier passed to confirm the fixed path stayed clean.

assertionResults.title: Published sample claims agree with observed diagnostics
assertionResults.reason: The maintainer-facing check-freshness command passed with the expected parity summary (17 canonical public ids, 16 outward-facing after the approved omission, 16 SampleApp directories, 16 sample/docs mappings, 32 highlights), and the focused freshness tests all passed including RulePageSampleFiles_AllExist_NoStalePathReferences.

assertionResults.title: SampleApp build is the canonical sample-diagnostics contract
assertionResults.reason: A direct dotnet build of SampleApp with analyzer SARIF emission succeeded, and the focused SampleDiagnosticsVerifierTests run separately passed SampleApp_ClaimedDiagnosticsMatchContract. That keeps the canonical sample-build contract and verifier surface aligned on the current repo state.

assertionResults.title: Runtime-failure guidance stays aligned between samples and generated docs
assertionResults.reason: DI015InAction still rebuilds with the two expected runtime-failure DI015 warnings, the focused sample verifier confirms the broken-vs-fixed contrast, and fresh site generation produced both the DI015 rule page and the unable-to-resolve-service problem guide that continue to surface the same DI015 guidance.

commandsRun.summary: Freshness check passed with the canonical public-diagnostic parity summary: 17 ids, 16 outward-facing, 16 SampleApp directories, 16 sample/docs mappings, and 32 highlights.
SampleApp rebuilt successfully and emitted SampleApp.sarif; build output ended with 31 warnings, 0 errors, and included the expected DI012 and DI015 warning lines.
DI015InAction rebuilt successfully and emitted DI015InAction.sarif; build output contained exactly two DI015 warnings for BrokenInvoiceScheduler and BrokenKeyedNotificationRunner and no errors.

Focused verifier/freshness rerun passed all 6 tests, including SampleApp_ClaimedDiagnosticsMatchContract, DI015InAction_BrokenCasesReportWhileFixedStaysClean, and the four sample/docs freshness checks.
Static docs site generation succeeded into the assigned evidence directory, including the DI015 rule page and unable-to-resolve-service problem guide.
